apps.author: jd1378
apps.name: Copy SMS Code
apps.changeLog:
- Increased code detection notification timeout to 3 minutes
- Fixed a bug where ignored phrases did not work in SMS mode
- Removed unused permission about accessing network state (It was added automatically by a library and not used anywhere. We decided to remove it for your peace of mind.)

apps.author: MaintainTeam
apps.name: Hypatia
apps.changeLog:
In this release we did some major updates to the database handling in the app, including upgrading the architecture, adding easier database source switching and better error handling.

## Features
- Added the ability to switch database sources between our Codeberg source, a GitHub mirror and a high-quality third-party database.
- Improved the error messages when downloading and validating databases.

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed a NullPointerException when using link scanning.
- Stopped the app from opening up on boot to show you an error message
- Switched to using the GitHub mirror by default for database updates, as the Codeberg server has been unreliable.

## Development Updates
- Refactored the entire database loading code, removing many potential bugs and bringing the codebase closer to modern Android.
- Updated our build scripts to use version catalogs.
- Migrated most remaining Java code to idiomatic Kotlin.
- Updated various dependencies.
- Updated translations.

## Database Updates
- Added the targeted threats database (https://github.com/MaintainTeam/HypatiaDatabases/commit/589362f45146a3d86be2507e0c5e25d36fb0fc56)
- Added some Indicators of Compromise relating to Covid-19 (https://github.com/MaintainTeam/HypatiaDatabases/commit/1d1a210bae8908802e5912342b59e60cb5b3e54a)

apps.author: session-foundation
apps.name: Session
apps.changeLog:
## What's Changed - Various bug fixes and performance improvements * Bring Release/1.33.0 back to dev by @SessionHero01 in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2096 * Removing our jitpack dependency by @ThomasSession in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2097 * Bump uiTestJunit4Version from 1.10.5 to 1.10.6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2092 * Bump androidx.work:work-runtime-ktx from 2.11.1 to 2.11.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2094 * Bump androidx.compose:compose-bom from 2026.03.00 to 2026.03.01 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2095 * Bump cameraCamera2Version from 1.5.3 to 1.6.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2093 * Add more documentations by @SessionHero01 in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2098 * Prepare for release 1.33.1 by @SessionHero01 in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2100 * Bring Release/1.33.1 to dev by @SessionHero01 in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2101 * Bump media3ExoplayerVersion from 1.9.3 to 1.10.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2091 * Take network connectivity into account when showing path by @SessionHero01 in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2102 * Filter group messages from blocked senders by @SessionHero01 in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2103 * Build and release documentation by @SessionHero01 in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2104 * Fixing issues with large images loading by @ThomasSession in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2106 * Early trigger of EmojiSource can lead to keystore access problems... by @ThomasSession in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2107 * Move keystore access further away from Application.onCreate by @SessionHero01 in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2109 * Bump net.zetetic:sqlcipher-android from 4.14.0 to 4.14.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2108 * Fix/store crashes 07 04 26 by @ThomasSession in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2110 * Add home activity as part of notification pending intent by @SessionHero01 in https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/pull/2111 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/session-foundation/session-android/compare/1.33.1...1.33.2

apps.author: tmo1
apps.name: SMS Import / Export
apps.changeLog:
### Changed

 - **Breaking:** Apply message filtering to wipe operations ([issue #237](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/237))
 
### Added

 - Add count messages operation ([issue #237](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/237))
 
### Fixed

 - Don't insert into non-existent MMS address columns upon import ([issue #322](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/322))
 - Cancel any scheduled exports when the `Enable scheduled export` preference is disabled ([issue #326](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/326))
 - Remove `android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE` ([issue #324](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/324))
 - Update Italian translation ([c001e65](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/commit/c001e656f539656d7afac5b85ecbedb3e96b6ead), [ae76174](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/commit/ae7617428457a2e35c1f8d3b68fb25033d552ac1)) (Random)

apps.author: comaps
apps.name: CoMaps
apps.changeLog:
General:
- OpenStreetMap data as of April 5
- Added auto-transliterated Serbian Latin UI translations - by @dobridabar https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3845
- Fixed an intermittent crash uploading OSM edits - by @pastk https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3987
- Fixed a routing crash - by @x7z4w https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3923

Android:
- Added organic options availability info for POIs like restaurants and supermarkets - by @jeanbaptisteC https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3697
- Improved right-to-left languages support in several screens - by @jeanbaptisteC https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/4002
- Fixed intermittent crash in Manage Route dialog - by @AndrewShkrob via OM https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3976

Map:
- Outdoor style: more prominent roads with contrast borders - by @pastk https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3975
- Added pickleball - by @patepelo https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3893
- Increased visibility of tree rows and trees in outdoor style - by @pastk https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3960
- Added road shields specific to Argentina, Uruguay and Bolivia and removed duplicate shields - by @gedankenstuecke https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3966 and https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3982 and https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3971

Qt / desktop:

apps.author: signalapp
apps.name: Signal
apps.changeLog:
Now you can optionally add a member label to describe yourself or your role in a group chat. Set your group member label to "Referee" or "Goalie" in your local rec league soccer chat to help kick things off when new teammates join, then choose a different label with your job title in the company chat. Member labels appear next to your profile name in that group, and group admins can control who can set a label with the "Edit group info" permission.

*For automatic updates, we recommend using [Obtainium](https://community.signalusers.org/t/get-the-latest-android-releases-even-faster-with-obtainium/65274).*
